must_detect.matched_text: Heads of Terms — Proposed Recommended Acquisition of Northbridge Payments plc by Britannia FinServ plc.

Conditions precedent: Approval by both sets of shareholders, ALA eligibility and prospectus approval, clearance by the Crown Takeover Council and Crown Competition Bureau, and customary regulatory and antitrust approvals.

Financing: Fully underwritten bridge and term facilities provided by Thamesgate Bank plc and Harbour & Mews Capital Ltd; the pricing grid, leverage covenants, and MAC definitions are not public and constitute inside information limited to wall-crossed recipients only.

Materiality and updates: Given Britannia’s free float and average daily volume, any revision to consideration exceeding 1.5% or any addition/removal of financing conditions is likely material to the issuer and will require prompt IAS notification.
Deal protections: Exclusivity until 15 July 2026, customary no-shop, and a break fee of £3.2 million subject to ALA guidance on indemnities and the Crown Takeover Council’s consent.
